steps.text: Semantic binding: Ad Delivery • Entity: Line Delivery

steps.expression: (() => { const close = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim() === 'Close')); if (close) { close.click(); } return true; })()

(() => { const api = window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__; if (!api || typeof api.patchBuilderState !== 'function') { throw new Error('patchBuilderState API not available.'); } const next = api.patchBuilderState({ pageSize: 4, page: 1 }); return next?.pageSize === 4 && next?.page === 1; })()

(() => { const text = document.body?.innerText || document.body?.textContent || ''; const keys = ['reportBuilder.state.demoReportBuilder.demoReportBuilderWindow', 'reportBuilder.state.demoReportBuilder']; return !text.includes('Local Draft') && keys.every((key) => { const raw = window.localStorage.getItem(key); if (!raw) { return true; } try { return !JSON.parse(raw)?.explorationSession; } catch (_) { return false; } }); })()

(() => { const text = document.body?.innerText || document.body?.textContent || ''; const keys = ['reportBuilder.state.demoReportBuilder.demoReportBuilderWindow', 'reportBuilder.state.demoReportBuilder']; const firstCell = document.querySelector('.forge-report-builder__table tbody tr td'); const firstValue = (firstCell?.innerText || firstCell?.textContent || '').trim(); return !text.includes('Local Draft') && firstValue.includes('May 3, 2026') && keys.every((key) => { const raw = window.localStorage.getItem(key); if (!raw) { return true; } try { const parsed = JSON.parse(raw); return !parsed?.explorationSession && parsed?.page === 2; } catch (_) { return false; } }); })()
